title: Syracuse basketball finalizing deal to hire Gerry McNamara as next head coach
summary: Syracuse University is finalizing a deal to hire Gerry McNamara as head coach of its basketball program. McNamara, a Syracuse alumnus and 2003 NCAA championship player, comes from a successful tenure at Siena College and will inherit a program that has missed the NCAA Tournament for five consecutive years. University leadership has committed to increased funding to restore competitiveness within the ACC.

political_signal.description: University leadership signal renewed commitment to athletics program through funding pledges and recruitment of beloved local figure to restore institutional prestige and community engagement.
